scripts.dev: concurrently -n app,upload -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev --prefix cheat-shop-app" "npm run dev --prefix upload-server"
scripts.start: concurrently -n app,upload -c cyan,yellow "npm run start --prefix cheat-shop-app" "npm run start --prefix upload-server"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix cheat-shop-app && npm install --prefix upload-server
